help.Chinese:
用法：help | help <命令/工具名>
功能：查看全局帮助手册或指定命令/工具的详细帮助信息
示例：
  help - 查看所有可用命令和工具
  help ls - 查看ls命令的详细用法
  help mktool - 查看mktool工具的详细说明
适配系统：Windows/Linux/Termux全兼容
help.English:
Usage: help | help <command/tool name>
Function: View global help manual or detailed help for specified command/tool
Examples:
  help - View all available commands and tools
  help ls - View detailed usage of ls command
  help mktool - View detailed description of mktool
Compatible systems: Windows/Linux/Termux
